issues.description: Rest action should be a condition (cost) of the activation, not an action. The ability is '[Activate: Main] You may rest this Character' — resting is optional and required to use the ability, not a consequence.
Filter excludes self generically, but card text specifically excludes '[Dogura]' by name. Should use 'excludeCardName' or similar instead of 'excludeSelf'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Play up to 1 red Character other than [Dogura] with a cost of 1 from your hand.
